The location of the closed laboratory complex for the development of our advanced combat weapons has been changed. As a result of additional agreements, all of them were taken to the Valley of Shadows for further placement. The information in the existing documents can only be deciphered after visiting the main laboratory in the Valley of Shadows.

Level 1. Detection of hidden stalker caches. Possibility of more thorough examination of the area for hard-to-reach hiding places.
Level 2. "Thief's Apprentice." Ability to commit theft when talking to inexperienced interlocutors. The theft amount is 100 rubles.
Level 3. "Experienced Thief". Ability to commit theft while talking to ordinary interlocutors. The theft amount is 200 rubles. In addition to money, any item can be stolen.
Level 4. "Master Thief". Ability to commit a major theft. The theft amount is 300 rubles. In addition to money, any artifact can be stolen.
Level 5. Skill "Attentiveness". This skill allows you to protect yourself from pickpocketing during a conversation with stalkers.

Level 1. Providing first medical aid. The ability to provide basic, but the highest quality first medical aid to the wounded.
Level 2. Basic healing of the "Apprentice" skill. Ability to perform the necessary treatment of lacerations received as a result of mutant attacks.
Level 3. Intermediate level healing of the "Experienced Doctor" skill. Ability to perform the necessary treatment of various burns and thermal injuries up to the maximum severity.
Level 4. High-level healing of the "Field Doctor" skill. Ability to perform the necessary treatment of all types and degrees of NBC injuries.
Level 5. Healing the maximum level of the "Field Surgeon" skill. This skill allows you to treat gunshot wounds received on the battlefield.

Level 1. Electronic suppression. Study of principles and fundamentals of electronic suppression, which is provided by creating active and passive interference, using false targets, decoys.

Level 2. Electronic protection. Study of principles and fundamentals of electronic protection aimed at ensuring stable operation of electronic equipment under conditions of deliberate radio interference.

Level 3. Electronic Intelligence. Study of the principles and fundamentals of electronic intelligence, which consists of collecting information based on the reception and analysis of electromagnetic radiation.
Level 4. Comprehensive technical control. Control over the state of operation of one's own electronic equipment and its protection from enemy technical reconnaissance equipment.
Level 5. Electromagnetic damage. This skill allows, with the presence of special equipment, to carry out electromagnetic influence by inducing induction currents.

Description of the first action. Calibration. By clicking on the button, a window of the same name will open in front of you, in which you will need to perform a certain order of actions. During the calibration operation, you must enter the numerical values of the parameters of the reference video pulse (Amplitude and Frequency). The data is entered in special fields. The values themselves will be indicated in the calibration window.

Description of the second action. Spectral analysis. By clicking on the button, a window of the same name will open in front of you, in which you will need to perform a certain order of actions. During the scaling operation, you must enter the numerical values of the coefficient parameters along the X and Y axes. The data is entered in special fields. The values themselves will be indicated in the spectral analysis window.

Description of the third action. Selection. By clicking on the button, a window of the same name will open in front of you, in which you will need to select the type of selection and the main amplification coefficient.

Description of the first aid kit.

It is located in an aluminum case, with a plastic coating inside, dimensions 52.6x40x17 cm, there are compartments for components, 26 cells for ampoules. It is used when urgent resuscitation measures are necessary.

Additional ampoule stand for 10 ampoules, OXYWAY oxygen supply system, including: 0.8L oxygen cylinder with a reducer with an oxygen supply rate of 4L/min, 200cm breathing hose, angled connector, Belts for attaching an oxygen cylinder, Manual ventilator (Ambu bag), COMBIBAG universal for adults and children, can be autoclaved, Inflatable rubber breathing masks 
 Oropharyngeal airways 
 Nasopharyngeal airways 
 Mechanical suction MANUVAC 
 Aspiration catheters sterile, 50cm.
The device performs diagnostics of the condition and automatic emergency medical care. In addition, it is possible to use various stimulants.

Contains a full range of drugs necessary for protecting the population. The new first aid kit is designed to provide first aid and mutual assistance, prevent or reduce the damaging effects of radioactive substances (RS), bacterial agents (BA), organophosphorus substances (OPS) and toxic substances (AHOV). AI-4 is equipped with modern, more effective pharmaceuticals. In general, the AI-4 first aid kit best suits the realities of today and can be successfully and effectively used both in reserve and for equipping active rescue units. It looks like a bright orange plastic box measuring 9 cm x 10 cm x 2 cm with the inscription "Individual first aid kit", a cross in a circle and protrusions for holding. Inside there are cells for medicines, cases with medicines, instructions. It is supplied in a polyethylene bag with information about the product and the manufacturer.
When you click on the button, the current state of the GG will be diagnosed according to five main parameters and an additional selection of preparations will be added.

When the button is pressed, the medical module will treat the GG with the possible use of additional vitality stimulants. In case of refusal to use stimulants, their subsequent use separately will be possible.
When the flag is enabled, the medical module will automatically apply the special radioprotector "Indralin-B190"
When the flag is enabled, the medical module will automatically inject a drug into the body that increases blood clotting.
When the flag is enabled, the medical module will automatically inject a psi-protection drug into the body.
When the flag is enabled, the medical module will automatically administer a universal antidote into the body.
When the flag is enabled, the medical module will automatically inject a drug into the body that increases overall endurance.

When you press the key, the current health condition will be diagnosed according to three main criteria - general condition, bleeding, radiation damage. That is, the level of damage to the body will be determined according to each of these three parameters.
When you press a key, the doctor will automatically administer treatment with certain drugs depending on the diagnostic results.

1- analgesic morphine

Metamizole sodium ("Analgin") is a medicinal product, an analgesic and antipyretic from the pyrazolone group. In many countries it has been withdrawn from circulation due to the risk of developing agranulocytosis. Refers to NSAIDs, a group of pyrazolone derivatives. Its mechanism of action is similar to other NSAIDs (non-selectively blocks COX and reduces the formation ofprostaglandins from arachidonic acid). Prevents the conduction of pain extra- and proprioceptive impulses along the Goll and Burdach bundles, increases the excitability threshold of the thalamic pain sensitivity centers, and increases heat transfer. Indications \n Fever syndrome (infectious and inflammatory diseases, insect bites - mosquitoes, bees, gadflies, etc., post-transfusion complications); Pain syndrome (mild and moderate): including neuralgia, myalgia, arthralgia... In special cases it is recommended for hypothermia and threadlike pulse.

Vikasol. Vikasol takes part in the formation of prothrombin by the liver and helps normalize blood clotting. The effect of Vikasol appears 12-18 hours after administration. Indications for use. Hypo- and avitaminosis K, obstructive jaundice, acute hepatitis; parenchymatous, capillary, hemorrhoidal, gastric, intestinal, nasal and pulmonary hemorrhages; wounds, operations, radiation sickness, thrombocytopenic purpura, the last month of pregnancy (for the prevention of hemorrhage in newborns), juvenile and pre-menopausal uterine bleeding, spontaneous bleeding during preparation for operations with difficult hemostasis, septic diseases with hemorrhagic phenomena, with an overdose of anticoagulants (dicumarin, phenylin). In special cases, it is recommended for use in patients in shock.

Dicynone. Hemostatic drug. The hemostatic effect is based on enhancing the first stage of the hemostasis mechanism (interaction between the endothelium and platelets). Dicynone protects the endothelium. It has been proven that Dicynone increases platelet adhesion, stabilizes capillary walls, thereby reducing their permeability, inhibits the synthesis of those prostaglandins that cause platelet disaggregation, vasodilation and increased capillary permeability. This leads to a reduction in bleeding time and blood loss. Dicynone does not affect the coagulation mechanism, prothrombin time, fibrinolysis and platelet levels (normal). Recommended for low platelet levels in the blood.

Dioxidine is a domestic synthetic AMP with a wide spectrum of action. It was approved for medical use in 1976. Due to the toxicological features, for the purpose of systemic action (IV) it is used only for vital indications for the treatment of severe forms of anaerobic or mixed aerobic-anaerobic infection caused by multiresistant strains when other AMPs are ineffective or intolerable. In severe forms of purulent infection it can be used intra-orally, endobronchially, locally. Mechanism of action \n Dioxidine has a bactericidal effect, the mechanism of which has not been fully studied. Dioxidine activity is enhanced in an anaerobic environment due to the induction of the formation of active forms of oxygen. In special cases, it is recommended to use it with a reduced content of leukocytes in the blood.

A bandage is a strip of fabric (gauze, canvas, linen, flannel) used for dressing wounds and applying a bandage. The structure of the medical bandage is a complex interweaving of cotton threads, type - plain weave of threads. The bandage fabric consists of two intertwined systems of threads, located mutually perpendicular. In special cases it is best applied when the patient is conscious and his general condition is within normal limits.

Morphine is a drug that has an analgesic (opioid) effect. Morphine derivatives are used in medicine, in particular, hydrochloride (for injections) and sulfate (as an oral drug). Morphine can effectively suppress the sensation of severe physical pain and pain of psychogenic origin. It also has sedative activity, suppresses the cough reflex. In special cases, it is recommended for use with a weak pulse and normal body temperature.

Tramal is an opioid synthetic analgesic with a central action and an effect on the spinal cord (promotes the opening of K+ and Ca2+ channels, causes membrane hyperpolarization and inhibits the conduction of pain impulses), enhances the effect of sedative drugs. In special cases, it is used for hyperthermia and rapid pulse.

Rheopolyglucin is a plasma-substituting solution, the specific action of which consists of increasing the suspension properties of blood, reducing its viscosity, promoting the restoration of blood flow in small capillaries, preventing and eliminating the aggregation of formed elements of the blood. Rheopolyglucin is used to improve capillary blood flow for the prevention and treatment of traumatic, surgical, toxic and burn shock. Recommended for hypotension and increased leukocyte count.

Penicillins are antimicrobial drugs belonging to the class of b-lactam antibiotics. Currently, the penicillin group includes drugs that, depending on their origin, chemical structure and antimicrobial activity, are divided into several subgroups. In special cases, it is recommended for increased red blood cell count.

Cifran is an antimicrobial drug of the fluoroquinolone group. The mechanism of action is due to the inhibition of the bacterial DNA gyrase enzyme anddisruption of DNA synthesis. Tsifran is active against gram-positive and gram-negative bacteria, including strains resistant to penicillins, cephalosporins and aminoglycosides. In special cases, it is recommended for increased platelet count in the blood.

Erythromycin is a bacteriostatic antibiotic from the macrolide group, reversibly binds to the 50S subunit of ribosomes, which disrupts the formation of peptide bonds between amino acid molecules and blocks the synthesis of microorganism proteins (does not affect the synthesis of nucleic acids). When used in high doses, depending on the type of pathogen, it can exhibit a bactericidal effect. Recommended for low red blood cell count.

Description of the first action. Analysis of the wounded person's condition. By clicking on the button, a window will open in front of you, which will provide a full analysis of the wounded person's condition according to certain parameters. It is necessary to remember these indicators in order to subsequently select the necessary drugs for treatment. The selection of drugs is carried out by identifying the correspondence for a particular drug for specific cases. Having remembered the indicators of the analyzing module, you can close the window.

Description of the second action. Reference information. By clicking on the button, a window of the same name will open in front of you, in which reference information about 12 drugs used in the device will be placed. The player will need to study this information to select the necessary drug for use in the third module. You should pay attention to the information for specific cases. For example, Tsifran is recommended for increased platelet levels in the blood. Therefore, it must be used when the first module has displayed the corresponding indicators.

Description of the third action. Treatment module. By clicking on the button, a window will open in front of you in which you will need to enter a certaincombinations of drugs for a particular condition of the wounded. Drugs are administered based on the analysis data and their comparison with reference information.

Description of the first action. Signal recognition. By clicking on the button, a window of the same name will open in front of you, in which you will need to perform a certain sequence of actions. During the recognition operation, it is necessary to scan the signal frequency, pass it through a bandpassfilters and determination of the carrier frequency of the high-frequency pulse. This value is transmitted to the low-frequency converter to prepare it for decoding.

Description of the second action. Decryption. By clicking on the button, a window of the same name will open in front of you, in which you will need to perform a certain order of actions. During the decryption operation, it is necessary to pass the received LF signal through a set of decoders. The decrypted values are transmitted in binary code, after which they are transmitted to the decimal code generator.

Description of the third action. Final binary code generator. By clicking on the button, a window of the same name will open in front of you, in which the generated code and its input for hacking will be displayed. This window can simply be closed, finishing the work.
HFS passed through PF...the desired F is found...transformed into HFS
Decoding of the low frequency signal:

Remember, your target is a bald man with a beard, middle-aged, wears a regular mercenary jumpsuit, nicknamed Beast, also signed in the CPC. Take a sniper position on the second floor of the old mill on the Cordon, wait untilthe target will be nearby, the main thing is that without an escort, you don't want to attract extra eyes, eliminate the target. After that, come back for the reward.

Damn, really, how long can I keep stalling, I'm tired of waiting for you already. And the place you chose is kind of dodgy, a stalker's camp on one side, mercenaries on the other... Damn it... On top of all that, shooting started on the other side of the embankment, in short, I'm getting out of here. I'll wait for you in the old tunnel under the embankment, at night, I won't change the price, consider that I took pity on you.

Beast, if you are reading this, it means that I am no longer alive... It is difficult for me to write these lines, but I must ask your forgiveness, I did not think very well of you when we first met on the Cordon, and my opinion did not change after you appeared in the Spatial Anomaly. Back then, I was one of those who was categorically against leaving you at the base, I thought that you would only bring us problems, but how wrong I was... Thank you very much for trying to save my life, it is a pity that it did not work out and we did not have time to say goodbye. I hope that you will all manage to leave the anomaly, I would really like for that to happen. Goodbye, Beast! \nWith respect, Dubolom.

пїЅ..God sent me a test.. I suffered for so many years, suffered for others, stole, killed.. I ended up in this damned Zone - and for what? To deprive others of life again for the sake of profit.. This is hell. Hell on earth, during life.. So that I suffer, so that I earn my atonement with blood. Past sins - cannot be forgotten, cannot be corrected, and the future - here it is, among the same as me.. The Supreme Will knows what awaits me tomorrow, but everything is in my hands, and salvation is not given for words and thoughts alone. I must prove by my deeds and example that I am worthy..пїЅ

%c[default]I don't remember anything... My head hurts terribly... Where am I? What is this place? Some kind of barn... Damn. And this strange dream... Or was it not a dream? What kind of creature did I see? And that laughter... I can still hear it. So many questions, and not a single answer... Okay, Beast, calm down... I need to sort myself out, put everything in its place. What happened before this nightmare? The last thing I remember is the chase. Yes, yes, I was catching up with Vector, and he slipped away from me. But how? Is he to blame for me ending up here? However, what difference does it make now... Okay, first we need to destroy the zombified ones that Lyuty spoke of, and then look for answers to the questions.

%c[default]I defeated those damned zombies! Oh, Zone, what are you doing to people?! They gave birth to you, and you... One of the zombies had some kind of note... The contents raise questions. I think Lyuty will be interested in looking at it. I head back to the barn. And also to the base. I still can't believe how I got myself into all this? How did I survive? All this needs to be sorted out...

%c[default]I've never seen this thing this close before... Marcus said we need to find a way out, and I completely agree with him. I don't want to be here when this thing comes back. What is it anyway? A human or a mutant, or maybe a ghost of the Zone? Damn, the further I try to go, the more questions arise. Okay, enough writing, we need to find a way out! That's what I'll do...

%c[default]Your mother! Controller, you bastard! Why have I been so lucky with creatures lately? First the zombies crawled in, now this miracle... A cabinet of curiosities, not an Exclusion Zone. Killed, the asshole. Now we know why those debtors turned into zombies. They were driven crazy by that creature that just fell under my bullets. Now the probability of our chance of salvation has increased by two percent and is... Three percent. A trifle, but nice.

%c[default]Lyuty has pestered me with his requests. Why don't you go, this Lyuty? Find this, bring that. The beast has turned into an errand boy. What will the Syndicate say if they find out about this? But in our situation, even shit is cake. It's worth running for the common good. After all, my life depends on it...

%c[default]Tesak and his gang will still answer for what they did, they won't get away with Sledgehammer's death... He's right about one thing, I really did lose my grip, this place helped me forget what cold-bloodedness is, or maybe that's not the point?.. So, Marcus said that he has some kind of plan that will help us resolve the current situation, we need to find out what he came up with.

%c[default]About a month has passed since Kuvalda's death, but that doesn't make it any easier... Coincidence or not, but it was after that night that weserious problems arose, contaminated meat is not the best food, so this epidemic came to our base. I managed to find some medicines for the guys, but alas, this is extremely little, there is definitely not enough medicine for all the sick, all that remains is to pray to God and hope that vaccination will help.

%c[default]These idiots put me in the same cell with the bandits, they thought I could be dangerous... Yeah, it seems like I got out of the Anomaly, but it didn't make me feel any better, I had to tell so much during that time, lose so many friends. The guard also said that Marcus didn't get out, but why, where did he disappear to? I should talk to Lyuty about this. Most likely, this is the last entry in the notebook, I don't want to tell about my experiences even on paper anymore. I don't know how I'll live on, it feels like I died inside...

Phew, caught my breath, but my leg still hurts... The fucking snork jumped out too suddenly, at least there was no fracture. I had to spend the last bullets from the machine gun to calm him down. Listen, Lyokha, if you're reading this note, then know that I'm still alive, wait for me in this basement, I come here for the night. I think that together we can find a way out of here, the main thing is to wait for me, okay? Sincerely, Shpala!

пїЅIпїЅm so hungry. I havenпїЅt had a bite to eat for probably two days. The dim lantern barely illuminated the impenetrable darkness that stretched deep into the bunker with its dim light of a cooling flame. Aslan, our guide, who was leading the group away from the chase, stopped whining, and it seemed to us that he was no longer breathing. ZhenyaпїЅs hand touched his neck, in a futile attempt to feel his pulse on the carotid artery. Half a minute, a minute... She turned away and covered her face with her hand, trying to pull herself together and not sob. She took a couple of steps back from the guideпїЅs lifeless body and literally collapsed on the floor. This time she was no longer able to hold back the heartbreaking scream that was escaping. I tried to calm her down, but it was useless. Her nerves had finally given out. We didnпїЅt know how much longer we had left to live, and we were waiting for the inevitable end. A couple of days later she went quiet. I don't know how long she would have continued to convulse, but her consciousness couldn't take it anymore and she passed out. She sat on her half-bent knees, slowly shaking her head, and looked into the distance with empty, bottomless eyes full of tears. A couple of hours later she died. I'm next. Well, I thought I wouldn't need it. The cartridge I pulled out of that loser soldier was very useful now. It would all be over soon. I take the machine gun off the safety and load a cartridge into the chamber. One movement of my finger and we'll all meet again."

пїЅI live one day at a time. Just one. Every hour, every minute, until my very last breath. While the sky is strewn with stars, while the dew irrigates the grass with its sparkling, radiant freshness. Not a single person in this corrupted world, disfigured by bile, pain and prejudice, can be as sincerely happy as I am. You are all just cogs in your satanic system of developed capitalism, faceless shadows existing according to the established rules of behind-the-scenes puppeteers and secret masters. I broke out of this quagmire, I managed to get out and now I am free. Free from everything. And from myself. If only I could live to see tomorrowпїЅ If only I could live to see it. The Zone frees the slaves of the outside world. It absolves you of your sins and helps you start a new life with a clean slate. It frees you from debts and obligations, giving you a chance to follow only your chosen path. Let it be short, let it be until the first anomaly or stray bullet, but still yours. And dying on your last breath, you will remember the taste of the tender lips of his last hot kiss, her misty eyes, full of salty unshed tears. She blesses her children on their last journey. The Zone knows that only a few will be able to return back in order to repeat the race again tomorrow. One breath, one gulp of air and a new step towards the unknown. Towards your freedomпїЅпїЅ

"In short, this Dolgov waffle of yours couldn't do anything worthwhile. No matter how much we bent him over after the puncture, it was all in vain. Either he's a plant, or he's working his ass off for the KGB - we won't be able to find out. That's why the lads need to resolve the matter with him. And resolve it quickly, so that our lawyer, the planted bastard, doesn't sniff out anything without our knowledge. They tried to persuade the guy to join our side with kindness, offered him profits - he's the wrong client. Apparently he's crazy. That's how it is. And as for that winged bastard, everything is completely clear. Kill the nit. Right away and quickly, before the clear dove gets his wings. He leaked the information about the Kordonov issue to the lawyer, leaked it completely. And Sidor, the bastard, has already passed it on to someone known and unknown. A fucking KGB agent, I hope he can't breathe oxygen. Prepare an action for the end of the month. Also involve a lawyer, so that his life does not seem like honey at all. Then plan his elimination. But without noise - quietly, so as not to attract the attention of the left. It is high time for him to retire. And do not overdo it with Sidor. Let his bastard be left alive. It is desirable to eliminate the lawyer in front of him, so that he learns his lesson and remembers his place. That's it, get to work. "

"Oh, I had to get dirty. What the hell did that thug do, she took it upon herself? Who's going to control all the cargo outside the Moscow Ring Road now? Gray? His brain atrophied back when his whore mother was fucking her ghoul. And there are no more people. There are no people. Serge is an even bigger asshole. He's a jerk, don't put your finger in his mouth, just give him someone to put down, show off, and ultimately lay into. How those idiots put him forward as a boss - I can't understand at all. Oh well, that's their pain in the ass, let them sort it out themselves. The fact that he can't pull it is not a problem, a knife under the rib and into the anomaly. No need to even bury him. And remember his name. Well, I've strayed from the topic. In short, drive the money in order to grease the goblins, because they've become very nervous. The birds seem to have completely cowered in their dovecote. Taking them out is no problem. The problem is elsewhere. Some fierce kid has been visiting the center of the Zone again. We tried to track him down, but the topic didn't work. The too serious pro refused. He took out all the Blues in the Dark Valley from start to finish. Plus, a lot of ours died at the Dump back then. So get through this guy through official channels. Work, guys. All hope is on you for now."

Step by step he approached his intended goal. Again and again he stepped over the withered leaves, barely audibly, trying to pay as little attention as possible to the half-rotten corpses that kept coming his way. The traveler walked, never ceasing to think about his absurdly deceased companion, seemingly detached from everything happening around him. The blind dog, whining pitifully and bending his paw that had been broken several days ago, hurried to retreat from the road and darted into the bushes. He, baring his teeth predatorily, looked after the stalker, while in his own way thanking his dog fate that this time he was lucky. It began to rain. It fell from a heavy sky, irrigating the dead earth with a ringing clatter of drops. The road began to wash away, it was becoming increasingly difficult for the traveler to walk. True, the torn bodies of unlucky hunters for easy prey began to appear less and less often. He let someone go after all. Which may have even been done in vain. Although he gave them their chance. Perhaps they will use it and save their worthless, useless livesпїЅ

...Every creature in the Southern Zone knew him. Only a few people who made their living this way could have such a specific signature. Murder was a craft that was commonplace here and few people could be surprised by it. Everyone, except for one... Orders to eliminate unwanted people poured in from customers to intermediaries several times a day and became something commonplace, like three meals a day among conscripts. Over the years, a whole network of hired killers spread out among the stalkers of the southern clans, controlling this or that territory and working for them like garbage men. Clans of mercenaries became shadowy masters here, whose will identified everything here - both the law and the court and the execution of the sentence. But a separate caste of loners even among them kept to themselves. People without a past and without a future, living for one day and for one minute, such as Max were rare and priceless. They knew they were the best in their field, and everyone who approached them understood it at the first meeting. No one knew where they came from or how long ago they had been in the Zone, but it accepted them as family, constantly educating and instilling in them more and more deadly skills. Max was an extra-class specialist, but his last order changed a lot. Why and why he took a different path no one knew, perhaps not even he himself.

The access code will be designated as follows:\nпїЅпїЅпїЅпїЅ пїЅпїЅпїЅ пїЅпїЅпїЅпїЅпїЅпїЅ пїЅпїЅ пїЅпїЅ пїЅпїЅпїЅпїЅпїЅпїЅпїЅпїЅпїЅ пїЅпїЅпїЅпїЅпїЅпїЅпїЅпїЅ пїЅпїЅпїЅпїЅ\nIt is necessary to study and apply the encryption method using binary code. Only some members of the group know the type of cipher and the key to it.

The key to the cipher is as follows: 
 Encryption using binary code: 
 Each letter of the Russian alphabet is encrypted with binary code, for example, letter A = 00000, B = 00001, B = 00010, G = 00011..., Y = 11111.
 Example: The word CIPHER. In binary code it looks like this: 
 11000 01000 10100 10000 
 Now we shift LEFT by 1 step, we get the code: 
 10000 10001 01001 00001 
 Now we translate it back into letters, we get the text: 
 RSI
 To decrypt it back, you need to perform a RIGHT shift to get the binary code of the original combination.

In short, I think I figured out what's going on here. The encryption method is as follows: 
 Encryption using the Caesar cipher: 
 Each letter of the Russian alphabet is encrypted with its analogue, obtained by shifting the entire alphabet by a given step.
 The basic alphabet is as follows: ABCDEFGHIJKLMNOPQRSTUFHTSCHSHSHCHYYEYUYA 
 Alphabet of correspondences with step 7: пїЅпїЅпїЅпїЅпїЅпїЅпїЅпїЅпїЅпїЅпїЅпїЅпїЅпїЅпїЅпїЅпїЅпїЅпїЅпїЅпїЅпїЅпїЅпїЅпїЅпїЅпїЅ 
 That is, instead of the letter A in the encrypted text there will be the letter пїЅ, instead of the letter пїЅ the letter пїЅ, etc.: 
 To reverse decrypt, you will need to perform a reverse match search to get the decoded text of the original word combination.
 The resulting text may consist of words rearranged. Next, you need to put them in order and, having understood the meaning of the phrase, find a four-digit numerical correspondence. This four-digit code is the combination we need to open the lock of the cache. 
 The encrypted text is as follows: пїЅпїЅпїЅпїЅпїЅ пїЅпїЅпїЅпїЅпїЅпїЅпїЅпїЅпїЅпїЅ пїЅпїЅпїЅ ILTPSPпїЅ пїЅпїЅпїЅпїЅпїЅ пїЅпїЅпїЅ пїЅ пїЅпїЅпїЅпїЅпїЅпїЅпїЅ

In short, it seems now it is clear what is going on here. The encryption method is as follows: 
 Encryption using the Caesar cipher: 
 Each letter of the Russian alphabet is encrypted with its analogue, obtained by shifting the entire alphabet by a given step.
 The basic alphabet is as follows: ABCDEFGHIJKLMNOPQRSTUFHTSCHSHSHCHYYEYUYA 
 Alphabet of correspondences with step 7: пїЅпїЅпїЅпїЅпїЅпїЅпїЅпїЅпїЅпїЅпїЅпїЅпїЅпїЅпїЅпїЅпїЅпїЅпїЅпїЅпїЅпїЅпїЅпїЅпїЅпїЅпїЅ 
 That is, instead of the letter A in the encrypted text there will be the letter пїЅ, instead of the letter пїЅ the letter пїЅ, etc.: 
 To reverse decrypt, you will need to perform a reverse match search to get the decoded text of the original word combination.
 The resulting text may consist of words rearranged. Next, you need to put them in order and, having understood the meaning of the phrase, find a four-digit numerical correspondence. This four-digit code is the combination we need to open the cache.
 The encrypted text is as follows: пїЅпїЅпїЅпїЅпїЅпїЅпїЅпїЅ пїЅпїЅпїЅпїЅпїЅпїЅпїЅпїЅпїЅ пїЅпїЅпїЅпїЅпїЅпїЅ пїЅпїЅпїЅпїЅ пїЅпїЅпїЅпїЅпїЅпїЅпїЅпїЅ пїЅпїЅпїЅпїЅпїЅпїЅпїЅ

%c[default]Damn it! I was carried away to Pripyat. It would have been better if I had just sat in the Bar and not known any troubles. The commander sent us to check some anomaly, near the old KBO. Something like a spatial anomaly. If I had known then what awaited us, I would never have gone there... At first everything seemed calm, but then, when mutants poured out at us from every crack, we jumped into this anomaly out of fear. We woke up here, in this place. Wherever we go, we always come back to this barn. How long will this go on?.. I think this is the end, we definitely won't get out of here alive. We're running out of ammo, we won't last long without it.\n

%c[0,1,0,0]пїЅ %c[default]To synthesize the poison, a chemical reaction must be carried out using three key components. Before starting the synthesis, the concentration of the original components must be calculated. One of the two reactions of choice, occurring under the action of a catalyst, has the following coefficients of input and output substances. X*(rea-nt1)2+Y*(rea-nt2)2+Z*(rea-nt3)2=2*(rea-nt1)(rea-nt2)3(rea-nt3)+8*(rea -nt3)+2*(rea-nt1) X*(rea-nt1)3+Y*(rea-nt2)2+Z*(rea-nt3)2=2*(rea-nt1)(rea-nt2)5+6*(rea-nt3)+2 *(rea-nt1)2 The concentration of one unit of substance at the input is 10. Calculate the coefficients in the equation and multiply them by 10 to determine the input concentrations of the components. Possible values of X,Y,Z multiplied by 10.
 30 50 20
 20 50 30
 50 30 20
 20 30 50
 30 20 50
 50 20 30
Radio frequency range, channel number and type:
1st channel; frequency 48.975 MHz; closed peacekeeping forces.
Clicking the button will interrupt the communication session.
By clicking on the button you will set the radio station to receive a signal from the frequency of the first open channel. Switching to a closed channel is impossible without special firmware.

Description of the first action. By clicking on the button, you will set the radio station to receive a signal from the frequency of the first closed channel of the peacekeeping forces. To stop receiving, you must click the "Stop" button. During operation, switching to another channel is impossible.

Description of the second action. By clicking on the button, you will set the radio station to receive a signal from the frequency of the first closed channel of the "Debt" group. To stop receiving, you must press the "Stop" button. During operation, switching to another channel is impossible.

Description of the third action. By clicking on the button, you will set the radio station to receive a signal from the frequency of the first closed channel of the group"Freedom". To stop receiving, you must press the "Stop" button. During operation, switching to another channel is impossible.

Description of the fourth action. By clicking on the button, you will set the radio station to receive a signal from the frequency of the first closed channel of the "Mercenaries" group. To stop receiving, you must click the "Stop" button. During operation, switching to another channel is impossible.

Description of the fifth action. By clicking on the button, you will set the radio station to receive a signal from the frequency of the first closed channel of the Monolith group. To stop receiving, you must press the Stop button. Switching to another channel is impossible during operation.

One day, when Muhammad was sleeping near Al-Kaaba, Jibril woke him up. The angel brought with him an unusual animal named Buraq and said that it had carried all the Prophets, and now it would carry Muhammad. Muhammad sat on Buraq, and it carried him through the air to Jerusalem. There he met Ibrahim (Abraham), Musa (Moses), Isa (Jesus) and other Prophets. They all prayed together, and Muhammad led the prayer, then he was offered to drink from three vessels: with water, wine and milk. Muhammad chose the vessel with milk, and this meant that His community would go the right way. And wine for Muslims has since become forbidden. After this, a ladder descended to him, along which he ascended with Jibril to seven heavens. In the lowest heaven, he saw Adam deciding the fate of the souls of the dead. The angels showed Muhammad hell, and he felt the heat of the fire and saw the terrible torments of sinners. As he ascended from heaven to heaven, he met the Prophets: on the second - Isa, on the third - Yusuf, on the fourth - Idris, on the fifth - Harun, on the sixth - Musa, on the seventh - Ibrahim...

...Then Muhammad visited paradise, where he saw the bliss of the believers. Then Allah spoke to him and obliged Muslims to pray 50 times a day. When Muhammad was returning down, Musa persuaded him to return to Allah and ask him to reduce the number of prayers. This was repeated several times until the number of prayers for Muslims was reduced to 5 times a day. When Muhammad told about his journey, no one believed him. People said: "The caravan goes there for a whole month, how can you fly there in one night?" Even his most faithful friend Abu Bakr doubted. Then Muhammad described to him Jerusalem, which he had seen from above and which he had never been to before. These descriptions coincided with Abu Bakr's recollections of this city, and the truthfulness of Muhammad's words was confirmed. Muhammad also told about the caravan, which he had also seen from above. The caravan arrived in Mecca after some time, and His story was confirmed.

One day a mullah came to the hall to address the believers. The hall was empty, except for a young groom who was sitting in the front row. The mullah thought to himself: "Should I speak or not?" And he decided to ask the groom: - There is no one here except you, what do you think, should I speak or not? The groom answered: - Sir, I am a simple man, I don't understand anything about this. But when I come to the stable and see that all the horses have run away and only one is left, I still give her something to eat. The mullah, taking these words to heart, began his sermon. He spoke for more than two hours, and when he finished, he felt relief in his soul. He wanted to hear confirmation of how good his speech had been. He asked: - How did you like my sermon? - I already said that I am a simple man and do not really understand all this. But if I come to the stable and see that all the horses have run away and only one is left, I will still feed her. But I will not give her all the feed that is intended for all the horses.

Ibrahim became disillusioned with idols and began to look for other gods: пїЅAnd when the night covered him, he saw a star and said: пїЅThis is my Lord!пїЅ But when it set, he said: пїЅI do not like those who set.пїЅ When he saw the moon rising, he said: "This is my Lord." But when it set, he said: "If my Lord does not guide me, I will be one of the people who have gone astray." When he saw the sun rising, he said: пїЅThis is my Lord, he is the greatest!пїЅ When it set, he said, "O my people! I am not of that which you associate with Him. Now I have turned my face towards Him who created the heavens and the earth, worshipping Him purely, and I am not of the polytheists." (Quran, 6:76-79)

An eastern ruler wanted to know the entire history of mankind. A sage brought him five hundred volumes. Busy with state affairs, the king sent him away, ordering him to present it all in a shorter form. Twenty years later the sage returned: the history of mankind now occupied only fifty volumes, but the king was already too old to master so many thick books, and again sent the sage away. Another twenty years passed, and the aged, gray-haired sage brought the ruler a single volume containing all the wisdom of the world that he longed to know. But the king was on his deathbed, and he did not have time to read even this one book. Then the sage told him the history of mankind in one line, and it read: пїЅMan is born, suffers and dies.пїЅ
04/18/11. The prototype's performance after comparison with the analysis results indicate that it cannot be used.

04/19/11. A test run at 75% of maximum power confirmed the previous assumption. The consequences of the experiment on modified human embryos yielded fruitful results. The mutant samples bred had truly unique properties. The object received an innate resistance to psi-impact and radiation of any intensity. The modified gene structure allowed the creatures to create a specific aura of semi-electric and thermal nature around themselves. Further research in this area will be carried out in three other directions. All data must be classified.

20.04.11. The question arose about the advisability of using the setup for a trial test of a local anomaly of class HA within a limited area with a radius of 25 meters in the area of a static pumping station in the southern swamps. The experiment is scheduled for 24.04.11 with the initial data specified in the appendix of the following entry.

04/22/11. The creation of a local source of occurrence of the anomaly of the HA is carried out according to the preliminary agreement with the object. For the experiment, use the following input parameters: A= 15, k1=5, k2= 10, k3=0, T0= 250

04/25/11. The creation of the focal zone was successful. The anomaly that appeared was activated at the appointed time in the normal mode. Measurements in the impact area revealed a positive trend in the parameters of the location and static nature of the object. The experiment should be considered successful. The above input parameters of the prototype are recommended to be used as a standard for subsequent experiments in this area.

13.48 05.06.11. The planned work to replace the batteries did not go according to plan. About 25 minutes after the cooling procedure began, the system failed. Forced power outage did not bring results. The backlash began. Power outage of the entire complex is only a matter of time.

14.35 05.06.11. Stop of the main electric generator. Immediate failure of the backup power supply system due to a strong voltage surge. Destabilization of the security fence system as a consequence. Immediate evacuation of all personnel.

15.03 05.06.11. There was an explosion in the reagent storage facility due to depressurization of the waste vents. The situation is completely out of control. The reagents spread more slowly without a working exhaust system, but the standard ventilation system is not able to cope. If the personnel are not evacuated within half an hour, this laboratory will become a crypt. Three guards have already died trying to hold back the flow of creatures that tried to penetrate the complex. The rest will not last long.

15.25 05.06.11. Several bloodsuckers broke through the security line. The remaining fighters tried to retreat through the emergency hatch, but it did not save them. They were crushed by the mass. We urgently barricade ourselves in the room 18.48. The ventilation outlets are blocked, but this is another twenty minutes at most. The breathing masks will last for another two hoursпїЅ

12/17 06/05/11. There is only half an hour of air left in the cylinders. Two of ours couldn't stand it and tried to break through. The mutants tore them to shreds. We don't know how much longer we can hold out. Even six of us have no chance of breaking through. There is nowhere to wait for help - they won't find out about the accident and death for at least a day, and about our death a little later. We can't be saved... Before the system was launched, I noticed that Professor Kamensky had risen to the surface. The accident was probably planned. Sabotage. Avenge us...

03.03.11. The main one has sent messages with the order to prepare the equipment room for unloading. Delivering all the necessary materials to the Valley complex on time is our top priority. The main installation must pass tests in the normal mode. After that, the complete closure of the facility on the Swamp is possible.
04.03.11. Professor Mitrofanov and his scientific team in full force were sent to a new place of work. Preparation for the first tests of the object Dolina should begin within a week.

07.03.11. The report on the preparatory work carried out must be submitted to the project management within the next three days. Ensure strict compliance with the regulations and all necessary rules when preparing for commissioning.

03/09/11. The project leaders set the primary task of commissioning the Dolina project as soon as possible. In addition, it was decided to continue work on additional profiles at the Bolota facility, in particular on the tasks of the CHA project.
12.03.11. The Dolina facility has been put into operation. We are moving on to distributing capacities according to the regulations.

02.08.11. What a nasty thing this collector is. We almost got ourselves into God knows what. Disgusting. Solid anomalies all around. And who even thought of placing some kind of installations here? Although, in principle, it's a good cover. If only it were that installation.

04.08.11. The approaches to the closed premises of the laboratory complex were nevertheless found the following day. Two guides were killed. One flew into the jelly, the other was hit on the head with something heavy by a burer who appeared out of nowhere.

05.08.11. After four long hours of work, our electronics engineer managed to crack the combination lock to the mothballed object. There is no lighting at all. Apparently, the backup generator also failed in the accident. I don't know why, but something is preventing me from moving forward. There is no fear, but it is somehow alarming.

06.08.11. It is not possible to get to the lowest levels. The passage is blocked by an anomaly of unknown nature. What we have seen here will be enough for many years to come. The personnel of the facility have been destroyed. A separate group of four people were found locked from the inside in one of the "sterilizers". They died of suffocation. What could have happened here is still unclear. It seems that someone turned off the security and life support system and mothballed the facility.

07.08.11. The electronic chip of the main module was in place. We are trying to leave the object through the upper branch of the collector. The beasts are pulling up in ever greater numbers. If we survive, it will be a miracle. If only we can reach the spare tunnel.

The O-Consciousness project is gaining strength again. This time, Krechet and Severin are unlikely to stop at anything. The mess they started with the use of sectarian groups could have very far-reaching consequences. In addition to the Monolith fanatics, the Sin group can be singled out in O-Consciousness operations. As it became known, the former group of crazy stalker-cannibals was almost completely destroyed a couple of months ago. The leader was eliminated by a certain Ghost, a lone stalker, and the united clans of Duty, Freedom and several smaller stalker groups finished off the rest of the sinners. As it turned out, this was not the only "nest". The surviving members of the group were later found and recruited into the new project.

The updated "Sin" was supplemented by the remnants of the destroyed bandit clan "Black Slugs". They appeared shortly before the culmination of the operation. They laid down one Dolgov quad and immediately disappeared.

A reconnaissance detachment of the Grekh group was spotted by the eastern brigade of mercenaries near Limansk. When they appeared in direct line of sight, they engaged in a clash. One sectarian was killed. Two mercenaries were wounded. The skirmish lasted five to seven minutes, after which both disappeared. The Svoboda soldiers who found themselves at the scene of the clash discovered the body.

As it became known, the sinners are trained according to a program similar to the Monolith's. However, their psychological processing was carried out at a higher level. Apparently, the O-consciousness used new codon programs, the programming of the sinners did not make them soulless soldiers - they obey orders unquestioningly, but at the same time possess the tactical and strategic combat skills inherent in trained fighters. In addition, it became known about the training of experienced saboteurs, who are supposed to be introduced into enemy groups.

It was the coordinated work of the sabotage groups of sinners that provoked a new round of war between the groups. The pitting of the central and southern clans against each other is the work of the sinners and O-Consciousness.

Colleagues, I remind you that the access codes to the closed facility of the Swamp will soon be changed. It will be necessary to undergo a repeat operation to change the security certificates. In this regard, it is necessary to reset the default keys in the ProCrypto system. Regenerate the internal system password, generate a request for a new security certificate using the existing working key, and generate a new technological access key. This operation must be carried out as soon as possible in order to avoid a possible information leak. In addition, the main ciphers in the information transmission system will be updated. Supervision of security issues will be carried out at the main base under the leadership of Suslov. Try to deliver all the necessary information via ground couriers, and as soon as possible. In addition to tropniks, it is possible to transfer information through the communication of the "Swamp" facility.

Transmission of the most important data on Clear Sky projects is carried out in encrypted form. The encryption used is of minimal complexity. The first cipher - Caesar's alphabetic, with the alphabet line shifted back by 5 (10) letters, was not used. It is enough to read the text of the inverted version.

You can improve one of the known properties of the artifact. To study the skill, you need to get information for the breeder to fine-tune special equipment for each artifact separately.
Armor repair is an optional skill, but it can be useful for better repair of your equipment using a specialized repair kit.
Armor Repair is an optional skill, designed to repair your weapon better using a specialized repair kit.
A mandatory skill to learn that will allow the protagonist to learn how to work more competently with a wide range of devices. Necessary for the successful completion of the task assigned to Red.
A mandatory skill to learn that will allow the protagonist to learn how to work more competently with a wide range of components. Necessary for the successful completion of the task assigned to Red.
A skill that will be useful to the main character if he is engaged in hunting mutants - for extracting valuable trophies from carcasses.
A skill that will be useful to the main character if he is engaged in hunting mutants - to extract valuable trophies from carcasses. (To learn it, you need the skill "Basics of Hunting")
The skill required to create a fully functional anomaly detector.
The skill required to create a fully functional artifact detector.
The skill required to create a fully functional life form detector.
A skill required to provide medical care of varying degrees of complexity.
Skills needed to survive in the ChAZO.
A skill needed to protect oneself from pickpockets, as well as to carry out one's own thefts.
Radar countermeasures skill required to carry out various operations in this specialty.

"The research conducted in this direction has yielded practically no results. Most of the subjects did not survive the second day after the operation. A sharp increase in the hemoglobin level in the blood was observed after the introduction of strain 3219, but this was not enough. One hundred percent death. It is not possible to develop prototypes within the specified time frame. An attack on Fedorov's group in the Dark Valley will also not benefit the further activities of the organization. Although most likely the mercenaries carried out only a demonstrative action, to divert the attention of other competitors. Fedorov himself was not harmed. We draw your attention to the strengthening of the consolidation of the strike forces of the Freedom group in a direction that is strategic for us. Be prepared to repel an attack. Ensuring the security of the facility is a priority.

"In essence, the Dion project was not something of utmost importance and top secret, rather it only performed a demonstrative function, to attract corrupt investors from abroad. They would not have been able to offer them anything fundamentally new and unique anyway. It was only a decoy, designed to divert suspicion from their main routes and suppliers. The scientific complex itself, where the equipment was located, and the main server installations of "Dion" are a subsidiary complex of the X-10 laboratory, for the main project "O-Consciousness". This complex was located in the northern part of the Dead City, between the partitioned basements and underground bunkers. Several recruited employees from a related organization worked in the complex. They were partly neutral towards us, at least Plutarch managed to get some of the necessary information from them. After the capture of the territory by the Duty clan, the further fate of the project is unknown. In case of any confirmation of its discovery or destruction, it is necessary to immediately organize an expedition to the specified square.

"The barrier could have been man-made. Ralph and his people had detected approximately the same radiation in the area of Amber Lake. However, the attempt to penetrate the territory of the complex ended in disaster. The sudden destabilization of the psi-situation in the area resulted in the death of the reconnaissance group. The scientists from the bunker just threw up their hands. Restoring the original situation was not within their competence. As it was established, the laboratory under the X-16 index, existing under the main complex, was the source of the saidradiation. Without multi-level psi-protection, it is impossible to be in the affected area. It is necessary to warn stalkers from allied groups about the impossibility of carrying out any activity in the area of Yantarnoye Lake. Closing the territory for an indefinite period. It is highly desirable to obtain support from interested parties in the development of comprehensive means of protection and the operation to eliminate the dangerous object. In the future, the experience gained can be used for the possible implementation of a breakthrough through the main barrier to the ghost town of Pripyat. "

"We don't know why all this happened. The experiment was going according to plan. However, something went wrong. Some little thing that we didn't take into account and failed to understand. We didn't know how it would all end. The mercenaries failed their task. Their convoys were dying one after another on the streets of this damned Pripyat. Something terrible was lying in wait for them at every turn and didn't let them take a single step through the clusters of anomalies. The batches of equipment and finished goods did not reach their destination. All this was unbearable, but no matter how hard we tried, neither requests nor threats could achieve the desired result. The suppliers and buyers were beside themselves with rage and threatened to terminate the contracts. However, this was nothing. All this was an empty wave, compared to what we are faced with now. Requesting evacuation was our only way out, if only it weren't for that unknown person in a black cloak who kept pushing us down a deliberately false path. But we had no choice. Everything began to collapse, and we were forced to accept the terms of his game. And we lost. He destroyed each of us, subordinating us to his will and the will of his patrons. He is just a pawn, but who else but a pawn can find the strength to become a queen?..пїЅ

пїЅO-ConsciousnessпїЅ took another step. And it was terrible. In fact, we did not know that preparations for the operation began long before the formation of our group of enthusiasts. Even then they knew that all our efforts would be doomed to failure, and that neither I nor anyone else would be able to stop them. And just the realization of this thought squeezed my throat, preventing me from breathing. This helplessness was killing me. Our enemy had prepared this war between the clans and played out his carte blanche. The Star Infusion was a success. Freedom declared war on Duty and moved its forces from the Dark Valley in the direction of the Dump, and further southwest to Agroprom and the Swamps. The bandits unexpectedly for everyone let them through unhindered, attacking the diggers and throwing the advance detachments to the Cordon. Everything started to go as abruptly as possible, and we found ourselves caught in the vice of this cycle of inter-clan warfare. The groups were exhausting themselves and could not notice how someone managed to deceive everyone and move forward towards the unknown. And he will destroy us if he is not stopped."

пїЅIn essence, this complex was not a complex, rather it only performed a demonstrative function, to divert the attention of commissions from other research institutes. The scientific complex itself was a large repository of all the documentation on one of the projects of пїЅO-ConsciousnessпїЅ. The complex was located on the territory of the former Research Institute пїЅAgropromпїЅ. The employees working in the complex were partly transferred from different laboratories. It did not play a special role, it only collected various documents and materials on the conducted research and experiments. Fortunately, before the Second Catastrophe at the Nuclear Power Plant, all the main documentation was taken out of the Exclusion Zone. The remaining materials were destroyed. After the accident, the group of scientists did not return to X12. So the laboratory was abandoned. However, according to unverified data, it seemed that someone was still using the laboratory for their own purposes. There is no exact confirmation of this. A couple of quads from the Duty clan were sent to her, but all the expedition members died on the way, which also raised many questions and suspicions."
